channel.title: Hackathon on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Hackathon on Eric Spencer

item.title: BrightBet.tech
item.description: An AI-powered trade and prediction analysis platform built for HackIllinois 2026.

item.title: CTA Transit Tracker
item.description: A real-time bus and train tracking system built during Loyola's Hackathon.

item.title: MLB Hall of Fame Predictor
item.description: A scikit-learn decision tree that guesses whether a current MLB player would get voted into Cooperstown, built for the Google Cloud x MLB hackathon.

item.title: Serenity
item.description: A mental wellness application developed at Northwestern's Wildhacks Hackathon.
